languages.text: "Прошу прощения? Я никогда не имел подобных связей с представительницами дома Гапрак!"
"I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"
languages.original_text: "Прошу прощения? Я никогда не имел подобных связей с представительницами дома Гапрак!"

traits.locale_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"
"I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"
"I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

languages.text: “你说什么？我从未与贾帕克家的成员有过这种关系！”
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

traits.locale_text: “你说什么？我从未与贾帕克家的成员有过这种关系！”

languages.text: « Pardon ? Je n'ai jamais entretenu de tels liens avec un membre de la maison Gaprak ! »
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

traits.locale_text: « Pardon ? Je n'ai jamais entretenu de tels liens avec un membre de la maison Gaprak ! »

languages.text: "Af buyur? Gaprak Hanesi mensuplarıyla hiçbir zaman böyle bir bağlantım olmadı!"
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

traits.locale_text: "Af buyur? Gaprak Hanesi mensuplarıyla hiçbir zaman böyle bir bağlantım olmadı!"

languages.text: «¿Cómo dice? ¡Nunca he tenido esa clase de relación con nadie de la casa Gaprak!».
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo dice? ¡Nunca he tenido esa clase de relación con nadie de la casa Gaprak!».

languages.text: "Bitte? Ich hatte nie eine derartige Verbindung mit einem Mitglied von Haus Gaprak!"
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

traits.locale_text: "Bitte? Ich hatte nie eine derartige Verbindung mit einem Mitglied von Haus Gaprak!"

languages.text: 「失礼ですが、私はギャプラク家の誰ともそのような関係を持ったことはありません！」
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? I have never had any such connection with a member of House Gaprak!"

traits.locale_text: 「失礼ですが、私はギャプラク家の誰ともそのような関係を持ったことはありません！」
